message:
feat(auth): add login page, GitHub/Google OAuth, and PWA support

Serve a login page instead of 401 when visiting without a token.
Support authentication via permanent token, GitHub OAuth, and Google
OAuth — all methods create a JWT and redirect to /?token=<jwt>.
Add admin UI for configuring OAuth provider credentials. Serve PWA
manifest without auth for installability.
